message:
feat(stdlib): add parsing/mail/scheduler modules

- sched: Event scheduler with priority queue
- mailbox: Maildir, mbox, MH, Babyl, MMDF mailbox formats
- mailcap: MIME mailcap file handling
- mimetypes: MIME type/extension mapping
- quopri/uu: Quoted-Printable and UUencode
- html.parser/entities: HTML parsing and entity definitions
- xml.sax/dom: SAX event-based and DOM tree-based XML parsing

files.patch:
@@ -145,6 +145,16 @@ const xdrlib_mod = @import("../xdrlib_mod.zig");

 const readline_mod = @import("../readline_mod.zig");

 /// Module to function map lookup
 const ModuleMap = std.StaticStringMap(FuncMap).initComptime(.{
     .{ "json", JsonFuncs },
@@ -3081,6 +3226,18 @@ const ModuleMap = std.StaticStringMap(FuncMap).initComptime(.{
